description: Log in to Moodle as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) at http://localhost/moodle. In the "Introduction to Chemistry" (CHEM101) course, organize the Question Bank by creating two new subcategories under the "Default for CHEM101" category: "Atomic Structure" and "Chemical Bonding". Move all questions with names starting with "Atom_" into the "Atomic Structure" category and all questions starting with "Bond_" into the "Chemical Bonding" category. Ensure the default category no longer contains these questions directly.
